Comment: Lesson 33 illustrative ASL only. Placeholder Lambda ARN values must be replaced before any deployment.

PersistTradeResult.Comment: Invoke the persistence Lambda. The Lambda writes S3 artifacts and DynamoDB status records; Step Functions does not call S3 or DynamoDB directly in this tutorial workflow.

RouteToManualReconciliation.Comment: Tutorial placeholder. In a deployed workflow this would route to an explicit reconciliation or human-review path before terminal failure.

Result.reason: Persistence task failed after bounded retry. S3 may have succeeded before DynamoDB failed. Do not hide this as success.

PersistenceFailed.Cause: Persistence task failed after retries and was routed to reconciliation before terminal failure.
